title: GENERAL DENTAL CARE - 211info
text: NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER MILWAUKIE DENTAL CLINIC GENERAL DENTAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental services for children and adults which includes diagnostic (exams, x-rays), preventative (dental sealants, cleanings, fluoride, education) and restorative (fillings, crowns, some root canals, extractions, partial and full dentures). Emergeny care provided for patients with symptoms of dental pain, an abscess, swelling or bleeding. 3300 SE Dwyer Drive Suite 302 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm (503) 850-4479 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 850-4479 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment FEES: Accepts OHP (Capitol Dental, CareOregon Dental, ODS Community Dental) and Delta Dental. Sliding scale fee available. No insurance $25-$50 down payment for first visit. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. If applying for sliding scale fees bring one of the following, last 2 pay stubs, previous year's tax return or unemployment statement. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus line 75, SE 32nd & Hillside stop. Bus line 33, SE Harrison & 32nd stop two blocks away from building. Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Dental Restoration Emergency Dental Care General Dentistry Pediatric Dentistry If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER MILWAUKIE DENTAL CLINIC
